div.div:
API Endpoints:
• POST /memos (Create)
• GET /memos (List)
• GET /memos/{id} (Read)
• PUT /memos/{id} (Update)
• DELETE /memos/{id} (Delete)
• POST /memos/{id}/ask (AI Q&A)
• POST /memos/summary (All Summary)
